metadata.name: beauris
metadata.summary: BEAURIS: an automated system for the creation of genome portals

classes.name: beauris.deployers.authelia.Dumper
documentation: Tidy up the yaml dump (indent lists starts)

documentation: Find a yml subelement from a list matching the current object

methods.name: beauris.raw_data_greeters.Downloader.process
documentation: Tries to process an url, returns a path to downloaded

methods.name: beauris.raw_data_greeters.PostDownloader.process
documentation:
Tries to process a downloaded (or local) file

Return True if no other post processor should be called, False otherwise.
Raise exceptions in case of errors

documentation: Find a yml subelement from a list matching the current object

documentation: Return a dict describing the current state of a file (to later check if it changed)

documentation:
Runs a job with this runner

Returns
    - the exit code
    - stdout
    - stderr

methods.name: beauris.managed_file.DerivedFile.__init__

methods.name: beauris.task.Task.get_derived_outputs
documentation: Returns a dict of derived files produced by current task

methods.name: beauris.task.Task.run_only_for_services
documentation:
Returns a list of tuples (service_name, entity), task will be run only if the services are enabled for the corresponding entity
entity can be a list, in this case, the task will run if any of the entities has the service

methods.name: beauris.task.Task.save_logs
documentation: Save stdout and stderr from str variables into files in work dir
